Black Ceremonial Coffin  
 


WT: 10.0 Size: GIANT
Class: SHD NEC
Race: HUM ERU DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Black Ceremonial Coffin

WT: 10.0 Size: GIANT
Class: SHD NEC
Race: HUM ERU DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:33:57
Page Updated:Wed Sep 22nd, 2021

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Merchants | Comments ]

Reagent for Spells

Spell Name
Lesser Summon Corpse

Merchants

▲ Page top
Crescent Reach vendor
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2008 at 6:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361789685
Scholar
59 posts
Merchant Wyn'las has this (and the other 2 higher coffins too) at Crescent Reach. He's on the bottom floor (1st floor) in a merchant hut just south of the elevator.
▲ Page top
Black Coffins For Dark Elfs
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2007 at 8:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591891865862
9 posts
my own replay glad to see EQ is still alive and going
▲ Page top
Black Coffins For Dark Elfs
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2007 at 8:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591891865862
9 posts
i have confirmed this for all my De brothers and Sisters Neriak Forein Quater, Palais Derekor is most Deff and good place for us to get them no fuss and easy to find she is in front of The Smugglers Inn , for the High Elf Chanters yes in your home town you can get them not sure of the name but it is in the first zone, for all other SK's and Necro's go to shadowhaven and try your luck with the little gnome lady ( btw she hates DE's And HE's )for the iksars i will add to this post to let you know where in shar-Vul you can get them.
I did this as my DE necro had one hell of a time getting her first few.
Ty to and old post i saw down below And ty to totombear for that info to quote.
Confirming that Satchel Vendor Arrin in Shar Vahl will indeed sell Black Ceremonial Coffins
to Iksar with no faction modification. I ran my
Iksar Necromancer to get some. Was no problem. this is totoms info i just rechecked and it is up to date ty for letting me rant on this but yes we have all had a problem out firat time out, so i hope this helps

Edited, Dec 11th 2007 11:46pm by gillwinn

Edited, Dec 11th 2007 11:48pm by gillwinn

6 posts

▲ Page top
Iksar Necromancer
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2007 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592307481159
17 posts
Ok for thsoe who dont know iksar necromancers at low level have a hard enough time tryin to stay alive in older zones .... paineel btw iksar kos, same with almsot every zone that was mentioned but i didnt check with Sharvhal ... was lookin for closer to pok proximity dangerous as most say it - get faction with such an such and then buy the coffins.... problem most zones thy are much higher lvl then u get this spell first off 2nd by the time u level enough to get enough faction ... why bother now u got new summon corpse spell and can just buy em in pok Get Faction doing the Trade Register quest or get a character buy em for u they are just over 1pp an change sold in shadowhaven at neg 400 and pos 1634 she is standing agasint wall facing area across where townspeople are in open building looks like a wooden circle with a roof rofl
▲ Page top
South Qeynos
QuoteReply
# May 05 2006 at 7:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803405919
16 posts
Vendor: Fellesha Varshen (not on the Find menu, look on the map just west of the exit to North Qeynos)
Location: 495.60 -306.06
Supply: Unlimited
Cost: 1p 5g 8s 3c
▲ Page top
PALAIS DEREKOR for you Dark Elf Necromungers
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2006 at 1:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591870300957
View User Forum
3 posts
This is me confirming that in deed Palais Derekor Sells the Black Cerimonial Coffins. After about an hour of searching or being killed in faction zones that just wouldn't let me even get to a vendor, finally found it there.
▲ Page top
How do u Summon?
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2005 at 11:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591861752201
22 posts
Now could someone PLZ explain to me how to use this? Do u have to target the corpse or what? And how do u use it with the spell.

Signed, Newb and Confused

Thx
▲ Page top
RE: How do u Summon?
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2005 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591799479863
Scholar
642 posts
target the player, not the player corpse--after all, if you're targetting the player corpse, there's no point in summoning eh? =)

so, make sure you have a couple of ceremonial coffins (in case of a fizzle that uses up the coffin), target the player, cast the spell, and the corpse will arrive. mind you, this works with players at lvl 35 or below.

i'm not positive of the range, but i think--mind you, *think* --the spell will summon a corpse from anywhere in the zone regardless of distance. also, i'm not sure where the corpse will arrive--could be at your feet, the feet of the player whose corpse you summon, or in the very close general vicinity.

hope tht helps. =)
▲ Page top

Innothule Swamp
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2005 at 9:25 PM Rating: Default
Ebelch

626 posts
Ruala in the Innothule swamp has Black Ceremonial Coffins. He is located a little south of the entrance to Gukta, next to a newbie guard & his lean-to.

Iksars
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2004 at 5:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591812754896
1 post
I cannot find a merchant that my Iksar can purchase the ceremonial coffins from. I had to invis to get to the merchant in the foreign quarter but she is too close to the guards when you reappear to purchase. I got killed after I purchased the coffins.

Any suggestions other than what I have done which is create another character that can purchase and then bank in shared slots.
▲ Page top
RE: Iksars
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2004 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255805958
View User Forum
56 posts
Try Shar Vahl. They are more tolerant to Iksar. My Iksar SK buys them there. Good Luck.

Update: Vah Shir are Indiff to Iksars.

QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2004 at 3:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761153178
Scholar
22 posts
So letts hear it for all us Dark Elf Nocro's :)
Deep down you know were nice people, but we are, to many people KoS :( So finding these darn coffins is hard.

May I suggest.....Neriak Forein Quater, Palais Derekor (( Satchels )use 'Find' you know it makes sence), buy for 1pp 7g 5s

Hope this helps someone.

May the gods of Norrath be with you :)

In Ak'Anon, a clockwork merchant selling satchels (loc +1265,-775) sells them. He is directly to the right of the ramp that leads into the building with the bank.

Non KoS Availability
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2004 at 2:29 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591796424762
Scholar
2,015 posts
I thought it was rather odd that there were few places necromancers or shadowknights could buy this item (safely), but then it occurred to me: The people with corpses to recover need this item the most! That would be squishy elves and halflings...

Dead One: I need my corpse summoned!
SK: Bring me a Black Ceremonial Coffin and 10pp...
Dead One: What? You don't have one?
SK: Well, I don't get killed deep in lower guk...Plus I dont usually carry around Giant items weighing 10 stone that are not weapons!

▲ Page top

Don't know the loc, but he is in a stand and there are 3 other vendors around him. One more in a stand and two by pools of water. It's all on the main ring around PoK.

RE: PoK coffins
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2004 at 7:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773553469
Scholar
20 posts
If you mean the Dark Elf Male near the 2 fishermen (Wood Elf female is the merchant in the other stand), he sells only the Jaid Inlaid and the Tiny coffins - an SK was wondering where they were, *everyone* in the zone referred to this particular vendor, but this one does not offer the appropriate casket apparently.
▲ Page top
Sold in the Bazaar?
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2003 at 1:48 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593966339725
Scholar
57 posts
Unless someone sold it to him all 3 coffin types can be found on Dashelo Dalroshan (-750,20), middle building, first vendor on the left as you enter. Black Ceremonial Coffin under 2 plat. Tiny Jade Inlaid Coffin under 70 plat. Jade Inlaid Coffin for under 150 plat.
▲ Page top
RE: Sold in the Bazaar?
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2003 at 11:15 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759488088
View User Forum
11 posts
Dashelo does not sell black ceremonial coffins; what you saw must have been the result of a player selling him one.
